title: How to use information from different columns using connect boards?
excerpt: I have a use case where I have a rate board with asset name, cost to create this asset and time required to build it. I am using connect boards functionality to pull in asset name into our main board where all of the pro…

posts.author: ameya.athalye (Ameya A)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have a use case where I have a rate board with asset name, cost to create this asset and time required to build it. I am using connect boards functionality to pull in asset name into our main board where all of the projects reside. Stakeholders can select asset from this linked column.
Right now I’m only able to use asset name (primary column) but I’d like to pull in the cost and time information into the main project board. How do I do that?

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Ameya!

You will want to use the mirror column! You will need two of the mirror columns - one for the cost and one for the time required column!

Since you already have a connect boards column set up to that board, you can make these two mirror columns linked to that same connect boards column.

Let us know if you run into any issues trying to set this up!
